title: Finite Graph Matching And Augmenting Paths

solver_reuse.target: finite graph matching Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Triangle no-perfect-matching exact-cover obstruction with independent DRAT and LRAT rechecking.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote overlapping invalid matching or augmenting-path constraints only when they add distinct graph-matching regression pressure; keep weighted or theorem-level matching claims out until the finite Bool route is exercised.

graduation_criteria: Encode matching constraints as deterministic Bool or pseudo-Boolean formulas.
Add checked certificate routes for maximum matching and minimum vertex cover where the theorem applies.
Extend the graph resource family with richer cut certificates and d-separation witnesses.
Move reusable graph helpers out of the validator only after matching, cuts, and d-separation duplicate the same logic.
